348 GG0170I2_WLK_10_FEET_GOAL_CD GG0170I2_WLK_10_FEET_GOAL_CD GG0170I2 Discharge Goal Walk 10 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to walk at least 10 feet in a room, corridor or similar space.
